notes: Estimate normalized mainly on built-up size (1,755 sq ft) and cross-checked against land-area quoted comparables in Happy Garden. Recent Happy Garden 2-storey/2.5-storey terrace transactions cluster around RM768k-RM1.045m on Jalan Riang/Jalan Nyaman, while live EdgeProp asks for similar terrace homes in the same township sit around RM1.20m-RM1.29m for ~1,650-1,914 sq ft; there is also a freehold auction comp at RM810k for 1,679 sq ft. Brickz’s broader Happy Garden landed median (RM750k) reflects smaller/older stock, so I weighted the larger freehold terrace comparables more heavily. A renovated or premium-position unit could push above the range; a basic/older unit could sit below it.
